patch.value: Run npm version, sync manifest + extension, npm run release:check, commit, tag v2026.05.25-1, push, npm publish, create GitHub release with release notes generated by pm-changelog itself.
Cut and publish pm-changelog 2026.5.25-1 release to npm and GitHub
Bump version, regenerate CHANGELOG.md, run full release gates, tag, push, npm publish, and create GitHub release for the 2026-05-25 readiness work.
Tag v2026.05.25-1 exists on origin/main, npm shows pm-changelog@2026.5.25-1 latest, and gh release view shows the release with notes generated by pm-changelog.
Ships the 2026-05-25 readiness improvements to downstream consumers.
Public release validates that all readiness gates pass on real CI.
pm-changelog@2026.5.25-1 published; release v2026.05.25-1 visible on GitHub; CHANGELOG.md updated.
Closes out the 2026-05-25 readiness session with a public release.

value.author: claude
value.text: Run from the local repo; release workflow handles scheduled runs but explicit release ensures parity for today.

value.author: claude
value.text: Avoid running this concurrently with the scheduled workflow.

value.author: claude
value.text: Explicit local release publishes parallel to the scheduled daily workflow ensure same-day visibility for hot-fix style readiness sessions.
